---
id: delete-secret
title: "DeleteSecret"
description: "Permanently deletes a secret from the workspace. The encrypted value is removed and cannot be recovered."
sidebar_label: "DeleteSecret"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"DeleteSecret"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/secrets/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Permanently deletes a secret from the workspace. The encrypted value is removed and cannot be recovered.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
